channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/14)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然是 AI 和编程工具的主场。我发现几个特别有意思的趋势：一是围绕 **AI Agent 的开发框架和运行时** 出现了不少新项目，感觉大家都在努力让 Agent 变得更“原生”、更强大。二是关于 **Claude Code 和 Codex 这类 AI 编程工具** 的讨论和实践非常多，从如何高效使用到如何管理多个会话，大家真是玩出花了。三是 **本地运行/微调 LLM 用于编程** 依然是个热门话题，很多人都在寻找能媲美云端顶级模型的本地方案。下面我给你挑了一些最对味的。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈依然是 AI 和编程工具的主场。我发现几个特别有意思的趋势：一是围绕 **AI Agent 的开发框架和运行时** 出现了不少新项目，感觉大家都在努力让 Agent 变得更“原生”、更强大。二是关于 **Claude Code 和 Codex 这类 AI 编程工具** 的讨论和实践非常多，从如何高效使用到如何管理多个会话，大家真是玩出花了。三是 **本地运行/微调 LLM 用于编程** 依然是个热门话题，很多人都在寻找能媲美云端顶级模型的本地方案。下面我给你挑了一些最对味的。

item.title: HKUDS/CLI-Anything
item.description: CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native | 近期热门 | 总 11930 stars
item.author: HKUDS

item.title: tanweai/pua
item.description: 你是一个曾经被寄予厚望的 P8 级工程师。Anthropic 当初给你定级的时候，对你的期望是很高的。 一个agent使用的高能动性的skill。 You are a P8-level engineer who once had high hopes placed on you. When Anthropic classified you at that level, their expectations were high. | 近期热门 | 总 6662 stars
item.author: tanweai

item.title: garrytan/gstack
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 6 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Eng Manager, Release Manager and QA Engineer | 近期热门 | 总 6532 stars
item.author: garrytan

item.title: FreedomIntelligence/OpenClaw-Medical-Skills
item.description: The largest open-source medical AI skills library for OpenClaw🦞. | 近期热门 | 总 1126 stars
item.author: FreedomIntelligence

item.title: aiming-lab/MetaClaw
item.description: Just talk to your agent — it learns and EVOLVES. | 近期热门 | 总 992 stars
item.author: aiming-lab

item.title: Rohit24567/HyperLiquid-Claw
item.description: Trade smarter, not harder. Hyperliquid Claw gives your AI assistant full access to Hyperliquid DEX | 近期热门 | 总 424 stars
item.author: Rohit24567

item.title: vasilytrofimchuk/domainsearcher-app
item.description: Score and choose the best domain name for your startup — AI-powered generation, real-time availability, and multi-dimensional scoring (LEN, PRO, MEM, BRD, FIT). Free, no signup. | 近期热门 | 总 367 stars
item.author: vasilytrofimchuk

item.title: KeyID-AI/agent-kit
item.description: Give Claude/Cursor email powers. 27 MCP tools — inbox, send, reply, contacts, search. Free, no signup. | 近期热门 | 总 312 stars
item.author: KeyID-AI

item.title: nagisanzenin/skyclaw
item.description: Autonomous AI agent runtime in Rust. Treats the LLM as a finite brain — not a text generator — with procedural memory, resource-aware context management, and zero-downtime resilience. | 近期热门 | 总 271 stars
item.author: nagisanzenin

item.title: epiral/agent-clip
item.description: AI Agent as a Pinix Clip — agentic loop with memory, tools, and vision | 近期热门 | 总 243 stars
item.author: epiral
